name: Syrstone
message: Syrstone, originally known as the Syracuse Stone Company, is a specialized subcontracting firm with over 50 years of experience inthe site and highway construction industry. The company providestop quality and cost-effective subcontract work including granite curbing, grooving grinding, unit paving, and rumble strips.We will upload 58gb of corporate data soon. Detailed employee personal information (SSN, passports, drivers licenses, credit cards, addresses, phones, emails and so on), financials, client information, NDAs, internal confidential docs and so on.
